login.subtitle: Please enter your details below.
login.tagline: Reconnect with the present, free your mind.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

seedPhrase.title: Please find attached your recovery phrase.
seedPhrase.warning: * Store this phrase somewhere safe. If you forget your password and do not have this recovery phrase, your data cannot be recovered.

mood.title: How are you feeling?
mood.subtitle: Pick the emotion that fits best right now.
mood.timeIndexLabel: This emotion is related to the

thought.title: What's in your mind currently?
thought.subtitle: Describe your thought in a few words.
thought.placeholder: Example: I'm feeling anxious about my trip to Mexico.

context.title: In which situation are you thinking about this thought?
context.subtitle: Describe the situation in which you are thinking about this thought.
context.placeholder: Example: I'm at home, watching TV alone on the sofa.

trigger.title: What event or situation in yout life could have caused this thought?
trigger.subtitle: Describe the event or situation in your life that could have caused this thought.
trigger.placeholder: Example: I traveled alone in a foreing country years ago and It worsened my anxiety.

legitimate.title: Is this thought legitimate or your brain is playing tricks on you?
legitimate.subtitle: Choose the option that best describes your thought.
legitimate.no: Brain is playing tricks on me
